'''竏嗅-ng-j-h''' ('''kakangjehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beastify|beastify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beastify|beastify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗅-ng-j-h
|-
! Lemma
| kakangjehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikangjehoko|thikangjehoko]] || [[word:jikangjehoko|jikangjehoko]] || [[word:shikangjehoko|shikangjehoko]] || [[word:kikangjehoko|kikangjehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokangjehoko|thokangjehoko]] || [[word:jokangjehoko|jokangjehoko]] || [[word:shokangjehoko|shokangjehoko]] || [[word:kokangjehoko|kokangjehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦkangjehoko|thﾃｦkangjehoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦkangjehoko|jﾃｦkangjehoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦkangjehoko|shﾃｦkangjehoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦkangjehoko|kﾃｦkangjehoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakangjehoko|thakangjehoko]] || [[word:jakangjehoko|jakangjehoko]] || [[word:shakangjehoko|shakangjehoko]] || [[word:kakangjehoko|kakangjehoko]]
|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
